issues_found: Experimental scope catastrophically narrow: only ResNet-20 on CIFAR-10/100 with AdamW. VGG-16-BN data exists (iter_005, 4 methods, phi spread 0.16%) but is absent from paper. ImageNet ALL FAILED with no root cause diagnosis. NoBN ablation incomplete (2 methods only). Project constraints explicitly require ImageNet and VGG-16-BN. Every top-tier WD paper includes ImageNet or LLM-scale experiments.

Lyapunov function V_t empirically INCREASES throughout training, directly contradicting Theorem 1's guarantee V_{t+1} <= V_t. Paper hand-waves this as 'dominated by mu_t*||w_t||^2 term.' If V_t increases, the certificate is vacuous — it does not certify convergence for observed trajectories. This is the most fundamental theory-experiment contradiction in the paper.

Theorem 2 (Cumulative Alignment Bound) has ZERO empirical validation. Methodology planned Phase 4 (96 experiments) specifically for this. Not executed. Paper claims bound 'strictly improves on worst-case analysis' with no supporting Spearman correlation, scatter plot, or comparison of bar_delta vs sup_delta.

CIFAR-100 data provenance mismatch: 5 of 6 methods' CIFAR-100 data comes from iter_003, while CIFAR-10 data uses iter_006 instrumented reruns. Different code versions, potentially different data augmentation. Paper does not acknowledge this.

PMP-WD advantage framed misleadingly. Paper says PMP-WD (90.29%) is 'consistent with optimality' over constant (89.80%), but p=0.12 (not significant). Method ordering REVERSED between iter_003 and iter_006 (constant BEST in iter_003, WORST in iter_006). This is seed noise, not a reproducible signal.

Theory-experiment optimizer mismatch: ALL theorems assume SGD dynamics (w_{t+1} = (1-gamma*lambda)*w_t - gamma*g_t). ALL experiments use AdamW. PMP-WD costate derivation uses SGD momentum but applies to AdamW's bias-corrected first moment. This gap is never discussed.

Figure 1 is a markdown placeholder (framework_diagram_desc.md), not an actual figure. No certified band visualization exists — the paper's central theoretical contribution has no visual. No Appendix A despite 'Full proof in Appendix A' reference. Only 6 of 8 planned figures present.

Subsumption claim (>=95% of training steps) appears without supporting data table or figure. The >=97% figure in Section 4.2 is unsubstantiated. If computed post-hoc by choosing band definition to fit methods, it is circular.

CIFAR-100 spread reported inconsistently: abstract says '0.76 points' (including no-WD), Section 6.2 says '0.58 percentage points excluding no-WD baseline', Section 7.1 says '0.76 percentage points.' Theorem numbering is non-sequential (1, 3, 2, 4). Random mask (90.12%) cited in Section 7.3 but absent from all tables.
Four missing appendices cited in main text: B.1 (Theorem 1 proof), B.3 (PMP-WD derivation), B.4 (RG derivation), A.3 (CSI sensitivity). Flagged since iteration 3, still not written.
issues_fixed: PMP-WD implemented and validated: 6 runs on CIFAR-10/100, achieves 90.29 +/- 0.12% on CIFAR-10 and 62.98 +/- 0.27% on CIFAR-100. Resolves E1 from iteration 5 (unvalidated algorithmic contribution).
Instrumented reruns completed: 5 methods x 3 seeds on CIFAR-10 with per-epoch V_t, alignment, norm, switching function logging. Provides diagnostic data for certified band analysis.
Source-of-truth conflict partially resolved: iter_006 instrumented runs use consistent code version for CIFAR-10 data. All Table 2 numbers verified against summary.json by writing review.
